description: Configure the control booth browser for the new theatrical production. Organize the bookmarks into an 'Archived - Acoustic Series' folder for the audio/concert bookmarks and four specific folders ('Fixtures', 'Control & Network', 'Gels & Gobos', 'Rigging & Safety') for the lighting bookmarks. Grant MIDI device (SysEx) permissions to https://app.malighting.com and https://console.etcconnect.com. Enable the 'Experimental Web Platform features' flag. Add custom search engines for 'etc' (URL: https://www.etcconnect.com/Search.aspx?q=%s) and 'rosco' (URL: https://us.rosco.com/en/search/site/%s). Configure the browser to prompt for download locations and set the default download directory to /home/ga/Documents/Lighting_Plots.
